refute_by: a headless contrast probe over the rendered chip measures below the claimed WCAG threshold
rendered_css: .chip-carbon-gray { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border: 0; cursor: default; border-radius: 16px; min-height: 24px; padding: 2px 8px; background: #f4f4f4; color: #161616; font: 400 12px/1.33 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: all 70ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0.38, 0.9); }
